user_query: I want to find popular thriller movies available for streaming in the US and get a brief overview of each movie along with the streaming services.

TaskList.description: Search for popular thriller movies currently available for streaming in the US.
Gather a brief overview for each of the thriller movies identified in step 1.
Check which streaming services offer the identified thriller movies.
Compile the results into a final list showing each movie, its overview, and available streaming services.
